title: Homologous recombination repair status in advanced endometrial cancer: an exploratory biomarker analysis from the randomized, phase II MITOEND 3 trial.
abstract: Poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) inhibitor use in endometrial cancer (EC) requires predictive biomarkers, currently lacking in clinical practice. This study assessed the incidence of homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) using genomic loss of heterozygosity (gLOH) and a machine learning-based HRD scar signature (HRDsig).
